title: epigeneium lyonii
intro: Epigeneium lyonii, also known as the Lyon's epigeneium, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to China. This epiphytic orchid is known for its unique white flowers with distinctive markings and is considered a medicinal plant, valued for its purported health benefits and properties. The medicinal properties of Epigeneium lyonii are said to include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, although the specific preparation methods may vary depending on the region and cultural traditions.
